dashboard.alert.new-version.title: New Version
dashboard.alert.new-version.description: A new version of the application has been released. We recommend refreshing the page to see the changes.
dashboard.alert.plan-expiring.title: Days until Pro plan expires: {count}
dashboard.alert.plan-expiring.descriptio: To extend your plan, go to the {link} page and pay for the pro plan according to the instructions provided. If you don't pay, you can continue using Haiku.lt's free plan.
dashboard.alert.plan-expired.title: Pro plan has expired
dashboard.alert.plan-expired.description: Your pro plan has expired. To use pro features again, go to the {link} page and pay for the pro plan according to the instructions provided.
dashboard.compliance.unknown-country.des: We don't have information about regulatory compliance requirements for your country. There might be compliance issues. If you have questions, please contact {email}.
dashboard.compliance.compliant.title: Compliance: Fully Supported
dashboard.compliance.mixed.partial.title: Compliance: Partial Support
dashboard.compliance.mixed.unknown.title: Compliance: Status Under Review
dashboard.compliance.category.b2c.label: B2C (personal clients)
dashboard.compliance.category.b2b.label: B2B (business clients)
dashboard.compliance.category.b2g.label: B2G (government clients)
dashboard.compliance.evaluate-hint: Not all categories may apply to your business — evaluate which customer types you invoice.
dashboard.compliance.notes.DE.b2b: Invoice format compliant (ZUGFeRD/EN 16931). E-invoice receiving via email is sufficient per German BMF (mandatory since Jan 2025). Note: Haiku covers invoicing only — freelancers and Kleinunternehmer using EÜR are fully covered, but companies subject to §238 HGB (GmbH etc.) need separate accounting software for double-entry bookkeeping.
dashboard.compliance.notes.DE.b2g: Invoice format supported (ZUGFeRD), but XRechnung CIUS validation (BR-DE rules) is not available for government invoicing
dashboard.compliance.notes.LT.b2b: Fully supported with i.SAF and EN 16931
dashboard.compliance.notes.LT.b2g: Fully supported with i.SAF and EN 16931
dashboard.compliance.notes.CH.b2g: Invoice format supported (CII/Factur-X), but government portal submission is not integrated
dashboard.compliance.notes.AT.b2g: Requires ebInterface format and USP government portal, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.LV.b2b: Requires Peppol network, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.LV.b2g: Requires Peppol network and VID eAddress, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.EE.b2g: Requires Peppol network, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.DK.b2b: Partially supported. Sequential numbering, mandatory fields, CII/Factur-X e-invoicing, and immutable invoice storage are supported. Peppol BIS 3.0 and OIOUBL 2.1 formats required for full compliance are not yet supported.
dashboard.compliance.notes.DK.b2g: Requires Peppol network, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.FI.b2g: Requires Peppol or Finvoice format, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.SE.b2g: Requires Peppol network, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.FR.b2b: Invoice format partially supported (CII/Factur-X), but accredited platform integration is not available
dashboard.compliance.notes.FR.b2g: Invoice format partially supported (CII/Factur-X), but Chorus Pro portal integration is not available
dashboard.compliance.notes.IT.b2c: Requires FatturaPA format and SDI platform, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.IT.b2b: Requires FatturaPA format and SDI platform, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.IT.b2g: Requires FatturaPA format and SDI platform, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.RO.b2c: Requires RO e-Factura platform, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.RO.b2b: Requires RO e-Factura platform, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.RO.b2g: Requires RO e-Factura platform, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.BE.b2b: Requires Peppol BIS 3.0 (UBL) format, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.BE.b2g: Requires Peppol network, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.PL.b2b: Requires KSeF platform with FA(3) XML format, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.PL.b2g: Requires KSeF platform, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.ES.b2b: Requires Facturae format and VeriFactu system, which are not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.ES.b2g: Requires FACe government portal, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.GR.b2b: Requires MyDATA tax reporting system, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.GR.b2g: Requires MyDATA tax reporting system, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.HU.b2b: Requires NAV real-time tax reporting, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.HU.b2g: Requires NAV real-time tax reporting, which is not supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.NL.b2b: Currently voluntary. Peppol BIS 3.0 mandate planned
dashboard.compliance.notes.NL.b2g: Invoice format supported (CII/EN 16931), but Peppol network is not integrated
dashboard.compliance.notes.US.b2g: UBL/IPP format required for federal procurement is not supported.
dashboard.compliance.notes.US.b2c: Sales tax invoicing is not supported.
dashboard.compliance.notes.US.b2b: Sales tax invoicing is not supported.
dashboard.compliance.notes.CA.b2g: Peppol BIS 3.0 (UBL) format required for government procurement is not supported.
dashboard.compliance.notes.GB.b2b: Requires Peppol BIS 3.0 (UBL), which is not yet supported
dashboard.compliance.notes.GB.b2g: Requires Peppol BIS 3.0 (UBL), which is not yet supported
dashboard.session.logged-in-as: You are logged in as {email}. You can change your settings {settingsLink}. You can find the help section {helpLink}.
dashboard.button.new-invoice.label: New invoice
dashboard.button.mass-invoices.label: Bulk invoice creation
dashboard.button.mass-invoices.tooltip: Create multiple new identical invoices at once from a template
dashboard.button.multi-edit.label: Batch edit invoices
dashboard.button.multi-edit.tooltip: Apply the same operation (send, mark paid, delete, etc.) to multiple existing invoices at once
dashboard.button.calendar-invoices.label: Create from Calendar
dashboard.button.calendar-invoices.toolt: Create multiple invoices from Google Calendar events. Each unique event name becomes a buyer, and the number of occurrences becomes the quantity.
dashboard.newsletter.label: Subscribe to haiku.lt news by email
dashboard.newsletter.error: An error occurred while changing newsletter subscription setting.
dashboard.invoices.title: Recent Invoices
plans-page.free.intro: You have access to all features.
plans-page.pro.intro: You have access to all features.
plans-page.free.email-notice: Note: Free plan emails include a small "Sent via haiku.lt" footer
plans-page.upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro and get:
plans-page.checkout.success-message: Thank you for subscribing. Your Pro plan is now active.
plans-page.checkout.canceled-message: The subscription order was canceled. You can try again at any time.
plans-page.pro.manual-plan: You have a manual Pro plan
plans-page.pro.can-subscribe: You can subscribe to automatic billing starting {date}
plans-page.pro.renewal: Your Pro plan is active until: {date}
invoices-export-page.title: Invoices Export (CSV)
invoices-export-page.button.download-zip: Download Invoice PDF files as ZIP
invoices-export-page.progress.title: Downloading Invoices
invoices-export-page.error.no-invoices: No invoices found for the selected period and series.
invoices-export-page.error.download-fail: An error occurred while downloading invoices
invoices-import-page.title: Import Invoices from CSV
journal-page.title: Income and Expense Journal Generator (CSV)
journal-page.include-expenses.label: Include expenses
journal-page.link.info: Information about maintaining income and expense journal records.
isaf-page.title: i.SAF Generator
isaf-page.description: The i.SAF generator is not fully complete. This tool currently assumes that invoices are issued in Lithuania. If you issue invoices to buyers from other countries or receive invoices issued from other countries and you need i.SAF, contact me - we'll see what we can do.
isaf-page.personal-code.label: Personal code
isaf-page.report-type.label: Report type
support.title: Support
support.pro-only.message: Support is a Pro plan feature.
support.description: Use this form to ask questions, suggest features, report issues, or provide feedback about Haiku.lt.
support.response-time: All messages are answered by a real person. Since only one person is working on this project, it might take several days to respond. Thank you for your patience!
support.form.subject.label: Subject
support.form.subject.placeholder: Brief description of your question or issue
support.form.message.label: Message
support.form.message.placeholder: Describe your question, suggestion, or issue in detail...
support.success.title: Message sent
support.success.message: Your message has been sent successfully. We will respond as soon as possible.
support.error.empty-fields.title: Required fields
support.error.empty-fields.message: Please fill in both subject and message fields.
support.error.send-failed.title: Error
support.error.send-failed.message: Failed to send your message. Please try again later.
calendar-invoices.step1.title: Configure Calendar Import
calendar-invoices.step1.explanation: This feature creates invoices from your Google Calendar events. Each unique event name becomes a buyer, and the number of occurrences becomes the quantity on the invoice.
calendar-invoices.step1.no-scope-warning: Calendar access not granted. Please re-authenticate to use this feature.
calendar-invoices.step1.error.fetch-cale: Failed to load calendars. Please try again.
calendar-invoices.step2.title: Review & Edit Invoices
calendar-invoices.step2.description: Review the invoices that will be created. You can edit any field or add/remove buyers.
calendar-invoices.step2.warning-many: You are about to create {count} invoices. This may take several minutes.
calendar-invoices.step2.error.no-buyers: At least one buyer is required
calendar-invoices.step3.title: Creating Invoices
calendar-invoices.step4.title: Results
calendar-invoices.error.invoice-limit-re: You have reached the invoice limit for free accounts ({limit} invoices). Please upgrade to Pro to continue creating invoices.
calendar-invoices.error.would-exceed-lim: Cannot create {trying} invoices - only {remaining} remaining in your free plan limit. Please upgrade to Pro or create fewer invoices.
calendar-invoices.error.limit-reached-du: Invoice limit reached during creation. Remaining invoices were not created. Please upgrade to Pro.
calendar-invoices.error.create-invoice-u: Failed to create invoice due to an unknown error
onboarding.step1.label: Regional settings
onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to Haiku.lt
onboarding.step1.description: Let's start by setting your language, country and currency.
onboarding.step2.label: Business info
onboarding.step2.title: Business Information
onboarding.step2.description: Tell us about your business. All fields are optional and can be changed later in Settings.
onboarding.step3.label: Email
onboarding.step3.title: Email Provider
onboarding.step3.description: Configure how invoice emails are sent. You can skip this step and set it up later in Settings → Email Provider.
onboarding.step4.label: Done
onboarding.step4.title: You are all set!
onboarding.step4.description: You can customise Haiku.lt further in Settings: change your brand information, how sent emails look, and how invoice PDF files are generated. Wishing you happy invoicing!
onboarding.step4.settings-hint: In Settings, you can change your brand information, customise how sent emails look, and adjust how invoice PDF files are generated.
onboarding.client-types.question: What types of clients will you invoice?
onboarding.client-types.not-supported: Haiku.lt does not currently support issuing invoices for this country. You can continue setting up your account, but invoice generation may not comply with local regulations.
onboarding.client-types.unknown-country: We don't have compliance information for your country. If you have questions, contact us.
dashboard.newsletter.note: We mainly send news about new features and updates — at most once per month.
